research_session.query: Building a cutting-edge frontend design agent: Latest tools, techniques, AI-powered UI generation, design systems, and systematic approaches for creating beautiful, attractive frontend designs

summary: Building a cutting-edge frontend design agent: Latest tools, techniques, AI-powered UI generation, design systems, and systematic approaches for creating beautiful, attractive frontend designs

features.description: Create orchestrator agent that analyzes UI requests and decomposes into subtasks
features.rationale: Orchestrator-Workers pattern recommended by Anthropic for dynamic task decomposition

verification.criteria: Agent correctly identifies component types, layout requirements, and styling needs from natural language

features.description: Implement design analyzer worker that extracts visual requirements from descriptions
features.rationale: Specialized workers handle focused analysis tasks

verification.criteria: Worker identifies colors, typography, spacing, and layout from user input

features.description: Create component generator worker for React/TypeScript output
features.rationale: v0.dev approach - generate React + TypeScript as standard

verification.criteria: Generates valid React 18 TypeScript components

features.description: Implement animation worker using Framer Motion patterns
features.rationale: Framer Motion is standard for React animations

verification.criteria: Adds appropriate micro-interactions to components

features.description: Create theme worker for design token management
features.rationale: Tailwind v4 CSS-first theming is modern approach

verification.criteria: Generates consistent CSS variables and theme configuration

features.description: Implement accessibility auditor worker for WCAG compliance
features.rationale: WCAG 2.2 compliance is legal requirement in 2025-2026

verification.criteria: Validates contrast ratios, keyboard nav, ARIA labels

features.description: Build six-element prompt template system for component generation
features.rationale: Structured prompts yield 3x better code quality

verification.criteria: Prompts include framework, purpose, props, styling, a11y, edge cases

features.description: Implement incremental prompting strategy (skeleton → state → styling)
features.rationale: Iterative prompting yields better results than all-at-once

verification.criteria: Agent breaks complex components into sequential generation steps

features.description: Create role-based prompt prefixes for expert-level output

verification.criteria: Prompts use Act as senior React developer pattern

features.description: Build pattern reference system for consistent code style

verification.criteria: Agent references existing project patterns in prompts

features.description: Implement shadcn/ui component generation with CVA variants
features.rationale: CVA is standard for shadcn/ui variant management

verification.criteria: Components use cva() for variant styling

features.description: Create Radix UI primitive integration for headless components
features.rationale: Radix handles accessibility, keyboard nav, ARIA

verification.criteria: Complex components use Radix primitives for behavior

features.description: Build cn() utility integration for class composition

verification.criteria: All className props use cn() utility

features.description: Implement ref forwarding pattern for all components
features.rationale: Ref forwarding required for react-hook-form integration

verification.criteria: Components forward refs for form library integration

features.description: Create atomic component templates (atoms, molecules, organisms)
features.rationale: Atomic Design provides clear component hierarchy

verification.criteria: Generated folder structure follows atomic design

features.description: Implement Tailwind v4 @theme directive for design tokens
features.rationale: CSS-first configuration is Tailwind v4 standard

verification.criteria: Tokens defined via @theme in CSS, exposed as variables

features.description: Create 60-30-10 color rule enforcement system

verification.criteria: Generated UIs follow 60% primary, 30% secondary, 10% accent

features.description: Build OKLCH color palette generator
features.rationale: Tailwind v4 uses OKLCH for more vivid colors

verification.criteria: Colors use oklch() for P3 wide gamut support

features.description: Implement typography scale system (3 sizes, hierarchy)
features.rationale: 3 distinct text sizes create clear hierarchy

verification.criteria: UIs use consistent 3-level type hierarchy

features.description: Create line height calculator (1.125-1.2x font size)

verification.criteria: Leading is 112.5-120% of font size

features.description: Build line length validator (40-60 characters)

verification.criteria: Text containers constrained to optimal width

features.description: Implement 8px spacing grid system

verification.criteria: All spacing multiples of 8px or 4px

features.description: Create monochromatic palette generator for elegant themes
features.rationale: Monochromatic palettes most accessible and elegant

verification.criteria: Can generate tints/shades of single hue

features.description: Build CSS variables theming system (--primary, --background, etc.)

verification.criteria: All colors use semantic CSS variables

features.description: Implement dark mode with semantic tokens
features.rationale: Semantic tokens simplify dark mode implementation

verification.criteria: Dark mode swaps variable values, not class names

features.description: Create FOWT prevention system (theme before hydration)
features.rationale: Prevents flash of wrong theme on load

verification.criteria: Theme applied via head script before React hydration

features.description: Build theme persistence with localStorage

verification.criteria: Theme preference persists across sessions

features.description: Implement system preference detection (prefers-color-scheme)
features.rationale: Dark mode is user expectation in 2025

verification.criteria: Respects OS dark mode setting by default

features.description: Create contrast validation system (4.5:1 minimum)

verification.criteria: All text passes WCAG AA contrast ratio

features.description: Implement focus indicator system (two-color pattern)

verification.criteria: Focus rings have 3:1 contrast, visible on all backgrounds

features.description: Build keyboard navigation for all interactive elements
features.rationale: Keyboard operability is core WCAG requirement

verification.criteria: All buttons, links, inputs keyboard operable

features.description: Create ARIA label generator for icons and buttons

verification.criteria: Icon buttons have aria-label or sr-only text

features.description: Implement focus trap for modals and dialogs

verification.criteria: Modal focus cycles within dialog

features.description: Build skip link for keyboard navigation

verification.criteria: Skip to main content link present

features.description: Create reduced motion respecting animations

verification.criteria: Animations disabled when prefers-reduced-motion

features.description: Implement whileHover animations for interactive elements

verification.criteria: Buttons and cards have hover effects

features.description: Create whileTap animations for click feedback

verification.criteria: Buttons scale down on click

features.description: Build AnimatePresence for mount/unmount transitions

verification.criteria: Elements animate in and out smoothly

features.description: Implement spring physics for natural motion

verification.criteria: Animations use spring() not linear timing

features.description: Create layout animation system for position changes

verification.criteria: List reorders animate smoothly

features.description: Build shared layout animations with layoutId

verification.criteria: Elements morph between states

features.description: Implement propagation pattern for parent-child animations
features.rationale: Variants flow from parent to children

verification.criteria: Card hover affects child elements

features.description: Create stagger animation for lists

verification.criteria: List items animate in sequence

features.description: Build container query support (@container, @sm, @lg)

verification.criteria: Components respond to parent size

features.description: Implement :has() selector for parent-based styling
features.rationale: Revolutionary CSS capability for complex styling

verification.criteria: Parent styles based on child content

features.description: Create gradient utilities (linear, radial, conic)

verification.criteria: Supports bg-linear-45, bg-radial, bg-conic

features.description: Build @starting-style for entry animations

verification.criteria: Elements animate on first display without JS

features.description: Implement View Transitions API support

verification.criteria: Page transitions use View Transitions

features.description: Create 3D transform utilities (perspective, rotate-x/y/z)

verification.criteria: Cards can have 3D flip effects

features.description: Build button component generator with all variants

verification.criteria: Generates primary, secondary, outline, ghost, link variants

features.description: Create input component generator with validation states
features.rationale: Form inputs are core UI elements

verification.criteria: Inputs show error, success, disabled states

features.description: Implement card component with hover effects

verification.criteria: Cards have shadow, hover lift, optional image

features.description: Build modal/dialog component with focus trap

verification.criteria: Modal manages focus, has backdrop, animations

features.description: Create navigation component with responsive menu
features.rationale: Navigation is present on most pages

verification.criteria: Nav collapses to hamburger on mobile

features.description: Implement form component with react-hook-form + zod

verification.criteria: Form has validation, error messages, submit handling

features.description: Build dropdown/select component with Radix

verification.criteria: Select supports keyboard nav, custom styling

features.description: Create tabs component with keyboard navigation

verification.criteria: Arrow keys navigate tabs

features.description: Implement accordion component with animations

verification.criteria: Accordion expands/collapses smoothly

features.description: Build toast/notification system with AnimatePresence

verification.criteria: Toasts slide in/out, auto dismiss

features.description: Create tooltip component with hover delay

verification.criteria: Tooltip appears on hover with delay

features.description: Implement hero section generator with text + CTA
features.rationale: Hero sections are common landing page pattern

verification.criteria: Hero has headline, subhead, buttons, optional image

features.description: Build feature grid generator with icons

verification.criteria: Grid of feature cards with icons and descriptions

features.description: Create pricing table generator with tiers
features.rationale: Pricing tables are common SaaS pattern

verification.criteria: Pricing cards with features, CTAs, popular badge

features.description: Implement testimonial carousel generator

verification.criteria: Carousel with quotes, avatars, names

features.description: Build footer generator with links and social icons
features.rationale: Footers are present on every page

verification.criteria: Footer has columns, links, copyright, socials

features.description: Create dashboard layout generator with sidebar

verification.criteria: Layout has collapsible sidebar, header, main content

features.description: Implement data table generator with sorting/filtering

verification.criteria: Table supports sort, filter, pagination

features.description: Build login/signup form generator

verification.criteria: Auth forms with validation, OAuth buttons

features.description: Create image upload analyzer for mockup-to-code
features.rationale: v0.dev supports image upload for reference

verification.criteria: Agent can analyze uploaded design images

features.description: Implement design critique system for iterative refinement

verification.criteria: Agent can evaluate and suggest improvements

features.description: Build component similarity search for pattern matching

verification.criteria: Agent finds similar existing components

features.description: Create AutoFix post-processor for code quality

verification.criteria: Generated code passes lint, type checks

features.description: Implement context window management for large projects

verification.criteria: Agent handles projects with many files

features.description: Build INP performance optimization checks
features.rationale: INP is new Core Web Vital

verification.criteria: Agent warns about interactions > 200ms

features.description: Create bundle size analyzer for component output

verification.criteria: Agent estimates component bundle impact

features.description: Implement lazy loading patterns for images and components

verification.criteria: Images use loading=lazy, components use dynamic import

features.description: Build React Compiler optimization awareness

verification.criteria: Agent knows useMemo/useCallback often unnecessary

features.description: Create quality scoring system for generated components

verification.criteria: Components scored on a11y, design, code quality

features.description: Implement design system consistency checker
features.rationale: Consistency is key to good design

verification.criteria: Agent validates token usage, spacing consistency

features.description: Build TypeScript strict mode enforcement

verification.criteria: No any types, all props typed

features.description: Create component documentation generator

verification.criteria: Components include JSDoc, usage examples

features.description: Implement Storybook story generator

verification.criteria: Components have Storybook stories

features.description: Build visual regression test setup

verification.criteria: Components have snapshot tests

features.description: Create responsive breakpoint preview system

verification.criteria: Agent shows component at different breakpoints

features.description: Implement live preview with hot reload

verification.criteria: Changes reflect immediately in preview
